scope: docs/ root location for PAPER-ROADMAP.md, RETRIEVAL-CONTRACT-SPEC.md, RETRIEVAL-FAILURE-TRIAGE.md, RETRIEVAL-STACK-ADR.md
corrected_assertion: The four originating-incident documents are archived under docs/genesis/. New paths: docs/genesis/PAPER-ROADMAP.md, docs/genesis/RETRIEVAL-CONTRACT-SPEC.md, docs/genesis/RETRIEVAL-FAILURE-TRIAGE.md, docs/genesis/RETRIEVAL-STACK-ADR.md. Rationale: these documents capture the genesis context of the EBR work and are no longer the live working specs — current work happens in paper/lncs/main.tex and the notebook suite. Archiving under docs/genesis/ preserves the historical record while removing them from the live-spec namespace. All four files migrate at R100 similarity (no content change, only path).
source: git commit 0b077c2 'docs(genesis): archive originating-incident documents under docs/genesis/' 2026-05-28
